company.name: AutoStream
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform providing AI-powered automated video editing tools for content creators.

policies.details: No refunds after 7 days from purchase date.
24/7 live support is available exclusively on the Pro plan.
Users can cancel anytime. Access continues until end of billing period.
7-day free trial on Pro plan for new users. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What platforms does AutoStream support?
faqs.answer: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Twitter/X, Facebook, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Do I need to install any software?
What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM for upload, exports in MP4.
